description:
As a developer
  I want to validate the users API
  So that I can ensure it works as expected

steps.name: I send a GET request to "/users/1"
the response status code should be 200

name: Users API

description:
As a user
  I want to login to the application
  So that I can access the secure area

steps.name: I am on the login page
I login with valid credentials from environment
I should be redirected to the secure area
I am on the login page
I login with invalid password from environment
I should see a flash message "Your password is invalid!"

name: Login functionality
